body:
APPROVE
Clean, targeted migration. The test now exercises real `ExecuteBead → LandBeadResult` semantics against an isolated real-git repo, with the "no changes" outcome produced by a script-harness directive file rather than a stubbed `mainHeadRev==wtHeadRev` pair. Scope was respected — sibling fakes remain referenced by other tests, which is expected.
